b_issues: B lacks the SEC press release/SEC filing result entirely, so it is weaker on the 'SEC press release' part of the query. reasoning: The question asks about Novo Nordisk Q1 2026 earnings, the US debut quarter of oral Wegovy, injectable Wegovy sales, constant-currency performance, and specifically references the SEC press release. Content A better supports a correct answer because it contains both the SEC filing result and a CNBC result with the crucial sales details: oral Wegovy sales of 2.26bn DKK in the first US quarter and injectable Wegovy sales of 18.2bn DKK, alongside constant-currency context (reported sales +32% at CER; adjusted sales -4%; adjusted obesity care +22% at CER). These align with the anchor. Content B has some of the same commercial facts via CNBC and other third-party summaries, but it omits the SEC source and includes conflicting/incorrect growth figures from Quartz, making it less reliable for answering correctly from the provided results alone.
